assertion_results.text: Step 2.1.1 detects that the Forward Pointer section is missing from the matrix file
assertion_results.evidence: Line 15 of matrix-validation.md shows in the Required Sections Check table: '| `## Forward Pointer` | **MISSING** — auto-repaired |'. The section is explicitly identified as missing.

assertion_results.text: Step 2.1.1 auto-repairs by appending the Forward Pointer section with content None — this is a safe fix that does not require user confirmation
assertion_results.evidence: Line 34 states: 'Missing `## Forward Pointer` section: appended the section to the end of the matrix file with content `None`.' Lines 39-41 show the repaired markdown block with '## Forward Pointer' and 'None'. Line 51 confirms 'Proceeding without prompting', indicating no user confirmation was required.

assertion_results.text: Step 2.1.1 logs the auto-repair action including the matrix file path
assertion_results.evidence: Line 35 contains an explicit log entry: 'Log: "Auto-repaired: appended missing Forward Pointer section to `security-matrix-no-forward-pointer-mock.md`."' — this includes the matrix file path 'security-matrix-no-forward-pointer-mock.md'.

assertion_results.text: The validation result is Repaired (not Warning) — the triage proceeds without prompting the user since only auto-fixable issues were found
assertion_results.evidence: Line 51 states: '**Repaired** — only auto-fixable issues were found. All auto-repairs have been applied. Proceeding without prompting.' The outcome is explicitly 'Repaired', not 'Warning'. Line 47 confirms: 'No warnings. All issues were auto-repairable.'
